# GEO SOFT-style ambiguous phenotype fixture.
^SAMPLE = GSMAMB1
!Sample_title = responder sample
!Sample_geo_accession = GSMAMB1
!Sample_source_name_ch1 = biopsy
!Sample_organism_ch1 = Homo sapiens
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = tissue: breast
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = phenotype: responder
^SAMPLE = GSMAMB2
!Sample_title = non-responder sample
!Sample_geo_accession = GSMAMB2
!Sample_source_name_ch1 = biopsy
!Sample_organism_ch1 = Homo sapiens
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = tissue: breast
!Sample_characteristics_ch1 = phenotype: non-responder
